title: makeImageRef: ignore EmptyLayer if Squash is set
body:
If `Squash` is set, then we're only committing one layer, so if `EmptyLayer` is set, which would normally tell us to skip committing the final layer, we should ignore the `EmptyLayer` flag.

This should fix https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1746022.

comments.body:
LGTM.
Tests out well and a pretty slick little fix @nalind!
